parsed_review.summary: CP00-840 is a descriptor-only RP27 Platform Extensibility "Hermes evidence + Claude review foundation bridge" pack (risk C, 150 units, RP27.P08.M06.S12-RP27.P09.M05.S05). The pack does NOT claim production_ready or runtime_ready (manifest reports both false, status in_progress); its actual claim — a runtime-closed, no-write, no-real-data, read-only descriptor bridge that hands off to CP00-841 — is fully supported by static inspection. Verified via Read/Grep/Glob: (1) registry.js CP840 binding/requirements/case-set/descriptor/packets are consistent with the baseline and runtime-closed (descriptor_only true, emits_runtime_receipt false, claude_is_final_approval false, read_only true, promotes_claude_to_final_approval false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening true, runtime_opening_pack_id CP00-841); (2) deliverable/phase/micro-title distributions match the prompt baseline exactly and sum to 150; (3) validators.js (lines 2183-2298) robustly enforce identity, distributions, per-row no-leak/no-write flags, no runtime opening, no permission/audit/product-state writes, packet gates, and handoff routing; (4) model.test.js (628-660) asserts coverage against the live plan, descriptor runtime-closed, read-only, and not-final-approval; (5) the on-disk contract matches the generated descriptor with validation.valid true, latest_pack_id CP00-840, all-safe no_write_attestation, and no real secrets/credentials detected; (6) the live closeout-pack-plan contains CP00-840 matching the manifest plan_binding_snapshot including source_ledger_sha, so coverage validation is non-self-referential; (7) index.js re-exports the CP840 surface the script/tests import. Hermes (H27) is used only as a deterministic control-plane evidence/receipt packet (descriptor-only, no runtime receipt), not embedded in product runtime; Claude remains a read-only reviewer and not final approver. Authority boundary (human final approval and enterprise-trust closed outside this receipt) is respected and not in scope to block this CP closeout. CP178+ hardening: this review output is well-formed schema-valid JSON; the readiness auth_preflight passed with valid JSON stdout. Command-evidence (5 commands exit 0; tests passing) is agent-reported — verified statically in source but not re-executed under read-only mode (expected read_tools_used inspection mode, not a defect). No P0/P1/P2/P3 defects found in CP840-scoped changes.
